nasb.text: the table also and its utensils, and the pure gold lampstand with all its utensils, and the altar of incense,

esv.text: the table and its utensils, and the pure lampstand with all its utensils, and the altar of incense,

cnv.text: 桌子和桌子上的器具，純金的燈臺和燈臺上的一切器具、香壇、

ccb.text: 桌子和桌上的器具、纯金的灯台和灯台的一切器具、香坛、
